finding_results.summary: The mid-chapter exchange now escalates through differentiated beats instead of repeating the same pleasant-surprise reaction.

summary: Chapter 1 now keeps June's singular unreadability seed while tightening the Eli/Hinge sequence into distinct turns that expose attention, competence, taste, cost, and the earned shift into voice-note and Signal intimacy.
